title: Water Engineer & Hydrologist
subtitle: MSc Water Engineering & Management, AIT Thailand · Researcher in Hydrology, GIS, and Climate Risk
bio: Water engineering researcher with 5+ years of applied experience across Nepal and Southeast Asia, combining hydrological modelling, geospatial analytics, and citizen-science methods to improve flood resilience and water security.
shortBio: Building resilient water futures through data, field science, and practical solutions.

highlights.biography: I am an MSc candidate in Water Engineering and Management at the Asian Institute of Technology (AIT), Thailand (GPA 3.87/4.0), focused on hydrology, climate adaptation, and sustainable water resource systems.
highlights.expertise: My work integrates SWAT/HEC-HMS modelling, remote sensing, GIS, and machine learning to translate data into practical water management decisions.

awards.title: AIT Scholarship (75%) + GWSC Scholarship (25%)
awards.organization: Asian Institute of Technology / Global Water and Sanitation Center

references.name: Prof. Dr. Sangam Shrestha
references.title: Dean, School of Engineering and Technology
